title: Dashboard Table Widget | Add Search Bar to Choose Groups
excerpt:
In the Dashboard Table Widget settings under the Choose Columns to Show there is a search box. 
 
Can a search box be added under the Choose Groups Menu?

posts.author: BostonEnv_CS (Caitlin Schimmel)
